name: Revolmon

signature_move.name: Justice Bullet
signature_move.description: Fires a giant bullet from the gun barrel in its torso.

description: A mutated Digimon whose body has become a gun barrel. Although the details of how it was born are completely unclear, it has a deep sense of justice and is active as a " Virus Buster ". Among Vaccine Digimon, the "Virus Busters" exists as a group of Digimon with the ability to eradicate and delete the consciousness of "evil" that resides especially within Virus Digimon. However, it also has a gambling-loving side and really loves Russian roulette in particular; it has quite the hard-to-hate personality and may overlook even a Virus Digimon if they can get through a round of Russian roulette. Its Special Move is turning itself into a gun barrel and firing off a bullet of justice ( Justice Bullet ).
